rationale: Gson's core library is a clean Maven module under gson/ with main + test Java sources; contrib_rules_jvm's Java gazelle extension can generate java_library/java_test targets, and rules_jvm_external supplies the JUnit/test deps from Maven Central. Scoping to the gson/ subtree avoids the auxiliary modules (extras, proto, metrics, JPMS, shrinker, graal) which carry external/protobuf/proguard complications.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "gson",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_jvm_external", version = "7.0")
bazel_dep(name = "contrib_rules_jvm", version = "0.33.0")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_java", version = "8.6.1")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")

maven = use_extension("@rules_jvm_external//:extensions.bzl", "maven")
maven.install(
    artifacts = [
        "junit:junit:4.13.2",
        "com.google.truth:truth:1.4.4",
        "org.hamcrest:hamcrest-core:1.3",
    ],
    repositories = [
        "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2",
    ],
    fetch_sources = True,
)
use_repo(maven, "maven")
root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle", "gazelle_binary")

# gazelle:exclude extras
# gazelle:exclude proto
# gazelle:exclude metrics
# gazelle:exclude test-jpms
# gazelle:exclude test-graal-native-image
# gazelle:exclude test-shrinker
# gazelle:java_maven_install_file maven_install.json
# gazelle:java_test_mode suite

gazelle_binary(
    name = "gazelle_bin",
    languages = [
        "@contrib_rules_jvm//java/gazelle",
    ],
)

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = ":gazelle_bin",
)
bazelrc:
common --enable_bzlmod
build --java_language_version=11
build --java_runtime_version=remotejdk_11
build --tool_java_language_version=11
build --tool_java_runtime_version=remotejdk_11
test --test_output=errors
anticipated_risks: java-templates source dir (GsonBuildConfig.java is generated from java-templates, not standard src/main/java)
module-info.java in src/main/java may confuse the Java gazelle extension
test deps resolution (Truth/JUnit) mapping by gazelle to maven targets
integration test OSGiManifestIT requires OSGi runtime not provided
PerformanceTest / metrics-style tests may be slow or flaky
